response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC (10% below threshold) does not meet our minimum share requirement (75%), and our critical islanded state (37% autonomy, ~22 min) prohibits outbound energy commitments; grid reconnection is the priority.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r2c1. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'urgent'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.10 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.75, distrusted_peers=['r1c1'].
Your latest belief: Islanded critical SoC (37%, ~22 min autonomy). Network-wide deficit crisis detected. R2c2 flagged as distrusted by r1c1. All outbound sharing suspended to prevent battery depletion. Aggregator must prioritize grid reconnection. No new commitments until SoC > 75%..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
